[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101001 3
1 00101000 2
2 00111001 4
3 00000000 a
4 01101111 6
5 01000100 2
6 00101001 3
7 10101110 5
